channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ambush in Lanao del Sur leaves one dead and four injured
item.description: A Maranao woman was killed and four others were injured in an ambush on Thursday night, April 23, in Barangay Bubongaranao, Calanogas, Lanao del Sur. According to local authorities, the victims were t...

item.title: NB Plc posts strong recovery and improved profits in 2025 financial year
item.description: Shareholders of Nigerian Breweries Plc (NB Plc) don give the Board and Management big kudos for di company's strong bounce-back and improved profit levels for di 2025 financial year. Dis recovery na r...

item.title: Michael Brennan Plays Shirtless During Zurich Classic Shot, Finishes Strong
item.description: During the Zurich Classic of New Orleans, PGA Tour golfer Michael Brennan gained attention for briefly playing shirtless on the 18th hole. Brennan removed his shirt when his ball landed near the water...

item.title: ICC Confirms Duterte Will Face Trial Over Alleged Drug War Abuses
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) has confirmed that former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte will face trial over alleged crimes committed during his controversial war on drugs. The ICC cites...

item.title: UK Reaffirms Sovereignty over Falkland Islands Amid Leaked US Memo
item.description: The United Kingdom has reiterated its sovereignty over the Falkland Islands following the leak of a confidential Pentagon memo suggesting that the United States might reconsider its support for Britis...

item.title: Pentagon's Falklands email sparks controversy ahead of Prince Charles' US visit

item.title: Ancient Antarctic Ice Reveals Surprising Climate Changes Over the Past 3 Million Years
item.description: Researchers have uncovered new insights into Earth's climate history by analyzing ancient Antarctic ice. The study, which focuses on ice cores from the Allan Hills region, reveals surprising details a...

item.title: Balancing Economic Growth and Sustainability in Tanzania’s Development Path
item.description: This opinion piece reflects on Tanzania’s current phase of rapid growth and asks an important question: how can the country grow in a responsible and sustainable way? The author explains that while ex...

item.title: Ontario Government Set to Pass Municipal Conduct Reform Before October Elections
item.description: Ontario's Minister of Municipal Affairs and Housing, Rob Flack, has committed to passing new rules governing the code of conduct for municipal councillors before the upcoming October elections. The pr...

item.title: KenGen boosts youth skills development through targeted mentorship programme
item.description: Kenya Electricity Generating Company (KenGen), kupitia foundation yake, imeendelea kuwekeza kwa vijana kwa kuendesha programu ya mentorship iliyofikia karibu wanafunzi 200. Mpango huu ulifanyika kwa w...

item.title: Plumber awarded damages after employer found liable for failing to address known safety risks
item.description: A 32-year-old plumber, Thomas Browne, has successfully sued his employers after being assaulted while carrying out work at a council property in Hammersmith. The incident occurred in March 2020 during...

item.title: Dogs player Samuel Hughes placed on report for dangerous tackle on Kotoni Staggs
item.description: During a recent NRL match, Bulldogs prop Samuel Hughes was placed on report for executing a crusher tackle on Brisbane Broncos' Kotoni Staggs. The incident sparked immediate concern due to the potenti...

item.title: Experts warn extremist online networks are recruiting vulnerable youth in Canada
item.description: Experts in Canada are raising serious concerns about the growing influence of online extremist networks that are deliberately targeting vulnerable young people. According to specialists in counter-ext...

item.title: Megna Homes CEO Ahmed Badawy appointed to KPDA board to support Coast real estate growth
item.description: The Kenya Property Developers Association (KPDA) has appointed Ahmed Badawy, the Chief Executive Officer of Megna Homes, to its Board of Directors in a move aimed at strengthening its presence across ...

item.title: Amit Shah dismisses Mamata Banerjee's vow to dismantle BJP nationally after Bengal polls
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee made bold statements during an election rally in Kolkata's Chowringhee constituency on April 24, 2026, vowing to win the state assembly elections and then ta...

item.title: EBB Air Embraer Aircraft Exits Runway Safely at Mandera Airstrip
item.description: On Friday, an EBB Air Embraer aircraft with registration 5Y-EBB overran the runway at Mandera Airstrip while landing on the Mandera-Nairobi route. Fortunately, all passengers and crew were safely evac...

item.title: Fuel Purchases Surge in the UK as Drivers React to Iran Conflict
item.description: Following the onset of the Iran war on February 28, 2026, UK motorists rushed to buy fuel, contributing to a significant 6.1% increase in fuel sales during March. This surge came as many drivers flock...

item.title: Hezbollah and Israel Exchange Fire Amid US-Mediated Ceasefire Talks
item.description: Hezbollah launched rockets and drones into northern Israel on Tuesday, claiming Israel had breached a recently agreed 10-day ceasefire. The Israeli military responded by targeting the launcher from wh...

item.title: Brooke Williamson’s Career Journey and Net Worth in 2026
item.description: Brooke Williamson, aged 47, is a highly successful American chef and restaurateur whose net worth in 2026 is estimated between $2 million and $5 million. She built her wealth through a combination of ...

item.title: Supreme Court Upholds Charges Against Businessman in 2017 Shabu Importation Case
item.description: The Supreme Court (SC) of the Philippines has denied the petition of businessman Chen Julong, also known as Richard Tan, who sought to dismiss the criminal case filed against him in connection with a ...
